subject: Gaming
title: The Great Layoffs of 2023-2024
description: A fast breakdown of The Great Layoffs of 2023-2024 for builders.

hook.text: Over 20,000 game developers were laid off in 2023 and 2024. Record profits didn't protect workers from cuts.

buildup.text: Microsoft, EA, Riot Games, and dozens more laid off thousands. Studios that shipped hit games weren't spared.

discovery.text: Companies cited 'restructuring' while reporting billions in revenue. Layoffs followed record earnings.

twist.text: Executives who approved overhiring during COVID kept their jobs. Workers who shipped successful games lost theirs.

climax.text: The layoffs accelerated calls for unionization and job security in an industry that treats talent as disposable.

punchline.text: Record profits. Twenty thousand fired. The industry values money over people.

quiz.question: What made the 2023-2024 gaming layoffs controversial?
options: Companies laid off thousands while reporting record profits
